race.comment: KING OF THE VIBE (5) settled worse than midfield then worked home okay but was never a contender last start in a similar race to this. Gets some welcomed weight relief today and the field isn't dripping with talent so he gets his chance to return to form. BILLY BOOM (4) was beaten narrowly at his first two runs this prep then started favourite but didn't quicken as expected here at this trip last time. Draws a far better gate today and the blinkers go back on so he deserves another chance. MAKING HISTORY (11) didn't jump all that well but rallied late to be beaten under two lengths over this course and distance a fortnight ago. Not the most reliable conveyance but must be respected based on that latest effort. IMPACTFULL MISS (9) has been kept fresh since scoring over 1000m at Yeppoon seven weeks ago. Harder here but drops 4kgs with the claim so she should be thereabouts. MOOCHI STARLIGHT (6) returned in good order last start and is not out of contention.
